name: Marianne's Kolachkies
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Solo filling (apricot, poppyseed, raspberry, almond, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and cream cheese together until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg and vanilla; mix well.
3. Gradually add the flour and continue mixing until a dough forms.
4. Cover the dough and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
5. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Cut into round shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Place the kolachkies on a baking sheet, spacing them apart.
8. Use your thumb to make an indentation in the center of each kolachki.
9. Fill each indentation with about 1 teaspoon of desired filling.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until lightly golden, approximately 10-15 minutes, depending on visual appearance.
Makes enough kolachkies for a whole house of hungry Polish people at Christmas or Easter time! For ordinary folks, this recipe is perfect for occasional treats.
